summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Iteration 45 - Membership Enrollment Fixes. All 14 backend API tests passed. Frontend features verified: email validation in Step 1, up/down sort arrows in CMS, icon dropdown with 29 options, My Sponsor page showing sponsor info correctly. Fixed route ordering bug in reorder endpoint.

issues: Console warnings about span inside select/option elements - React DevTools related, not a code issue

test_credentials: Admin: admin@consultant.com / Admin123!, Test member: fulltest@example.com / MyPass2024!
seed_data_creation: Created and cleaned up test richtext and datetime fields for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 45 enrollment fixes fully tested. Fixed route ordering bug where PUT /admin/enrollment-fields/reorder was being matched by {field_id} parameter route. All features working: email validation in Step 1, reorder endpoint, invite code fields after enrollment, My Sponsor page, richtext/datetime field types in CMS.

backend_apis.POST /api/public/enrollment/check-email: PASS - Rejects existing emails, accepts new ones
backend_apis.POST /api/public/enrollment/submit: PASS - Returns full member data including level_id and sponsor_id
backend_apis.PUT /api/admin/enrollment-fields/reorder: PASS - Field reordering works (after route fix)
backend_apis.GET /api/member/my-sponsor: PASS - Returns sponsor info for enrolled members
backend_apis.GET /api/member/my-level: PASS - Returns level info for members
backend_apis.POST /api/admin/enrollment-fields (richt: PASS - Can create richtext field type
backend_apis.POST /api/admin/enrollment-fields (datet: PASS - Can create datetime field type

frontend_enrollment_page.Email validation in Step 1: PASS - Shows 'Email already registered' error for existing emails
frontend_enrollment_page.Step 1 fields present: PASS - invite_code, email, first_name, last_name, password, confirm_password
frontend_enrollment_page.Password strength indicator: PASS - Shows 5-bar indicator with 'Very Strong' label

admin_enrollment_fields_manager.Up/down sort arrows: PASS - 51 up buttons and 51 down buttons present
admin_enrollment_fields_manager.Icon dropdown: PASS - SELECT dropdown with 29 icon options
admin_enrollment_fields_manager.Field editor form: PASS - Shows all fields including Icon dropdown

member_account.Membership Profile: PASS - Shows enrolled data (name, phone, gender, country, etc.)
member_account.Sidebar restrictions: PASS - Shows only Level 1 sections (Membership Profile, My Sponsor)

bug_fixed.root_cause: Route ordering issue - /reorder was defined after /{field_id} so 'reorder' was being matched as a field_id parameter
bug_fixed.fix: Moved reorder route definition before parameterized routes in /app/backend/routes/enrollment.py
